Ivian Marrie

About

Ivian Marrie

With an international career spanning South America, the United States, Europe, and the high seas, I have completed more than 120 projects. The portfolio includes 12-story luxury developments, high-end penthouses, exclusive private residences, and custom superyachts.

Known for blending innovation, elegance, and functionality, each project reflects a commitment to refined design, technical precision, and timeless architectural vision — whether on land or at sea.
